# Analysis — Interviews #6: Glenn Diesen — Great Power Wars Over a New World Order

- **video_id:** `80jUKe0blAQ`
- **canonical_url:** https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=80jUKe0blAQ
- **series / episode:** Predictive History · Volume VI — Interviews #6
- **raw_transcript:** [lectures/interviews-06-glenn-diesen-great-power-wars-new-world-order.md](../lectures/interviews-06-glenn-diesen-great-power-wars-new-world-order.md)
- **analyzed_at:** 2026-03-25 (operator)

## Thesis / aim

The interview frames **US–China** and **middle-power** dynamics through **Carney/Davos** vs **Trump/NSS**, **elite** “consensus” **illusion**, **Trump** as **elite**-replacement project, **NATO** and **Europe** **reshaping**, **meritocracy** **critique** (Yale), **Rorty** **1998** **strongman** **path**, **neoliberalism** **roots**, **1930s** **parallel**, **East Asia** **demographic** / **savings** **limits**, **Solzhenitsyn** **Harvard**, **Iran** **regime** **resilience** and **color** **playbook**, **Canada** **sovereignty** and **hypothetical** **Alberta** **wedge**.

## Defined terms (speaker usage)

- **Vassalization** — Allies’ **Treasuries** / **wealth** as **subordinate** to **US** **control** in **NSS** **logic**.
- **Trump world order** — Replace **Davos** **elite** with **new** **elite**; **NATO** **leadership** **swap**; **Europe** **right** **populist** **vector**.
- **Rorty (1998)** — **Suburban** **electoral** **crack** → **strongmen** **after** **globalization** **stress**.

## Claims (numbered)

1. **Carney** **WEF** **speech** = **middle** **powers** **+** **BRICS** **multilateral** **gold** **blockchain** **imagery** vs **US** **empire** **tactics** in **NSS**.
2. **Trump** as **outsider** **rupturing** **Davos** **club**; **elite** **seeks** **new** **alignment** **narratives**.
3. **Domestic** **US** **faction** **story** (**Minneapolis**, **ICE**, **Silicon** **Valley** **vs** **Wall** **Street**) **ties** to **federal** **bureaucracy** **war**.
4. **Greenland** **as** **NATO** **humiliation** **play**; **Europe** **right** **parties** **named** as **Trump** **interlocutors**.
5. **Meritocracy** **critique** → **elite** **blindness** **post-2016**; **Rorty** **quoted** **as** **predictive**.
6. **China** **no** **replacement** **hegemon** **wish**; **multilateral** **order** **breakdown** without **clear** **successor**.
7. **East** **Asia** **pessimism**: **fertility**, **exports**, **oil**, **historical** **rivalry**.
8. **Iran** **breakup** **thesis** **vs** **Persian** **/** **Shia** **resilience** **martyrdom** **frame**; **Mossad** **/** **color** **playbook** **claims**.
9. **Canada** **/ sovereignty** **/ Maduro** **example** — **international** **law** **vs** **power** **facade**.

## Internal tensions (if any)

- **Speculative** **claims** **(ICE** **as** **Gestapo**, **third** **term** **logic**, **Alberta** **referendum** **scenario**) **mix** **with** **analytical** **history** **frames** — **layer** **as** **hypothesis** **in** **book** **lane**.
- **Interview** **is** **argumentative**; **not** **all** **assertions** **are** **equally** **evidence-backed**.
